description_long: This object consists of four stylized flowers, each with a long, slender green stem and a large, multi-petaled bloom. The petals are broad, slightly pointed, and arranged in a radial pattern, with each flower displaying a different pastel color: orange, white, lavender, and light blue. The centers of the flowers are pale yellow and slightly raised, giving a subtle contrast to the petals. The stems are straight and cylindrical, with a smooth texture and a slight variation in green shades. No leaves are visible on the stems, and the flowers are grouped closely together, suggesting a decorative or ornamental arrangement. The overall appearance is clean, simple, and visually appealing, suitable for urban parks, gardens, or decorative planters.
description: A group of four pastel-colored, multi-petaled flowers with long green stems and yellow centers, arranged closely together. The petals are broad and radially arranged, giving a soft, ornamental look.
description_view_0: Three flowers are prominent, with the orange flower in front and the others slightly behind, showing the radial petal arrangement and long stems.
description_view_1: All four flowers are visible from the front, with the orange flower elevated and centered, highlighting the variation in petal colors and stem positions.
description_view_2: The orange flower is to the right, with the other flowers overlapping behind, emphasizing the layered petal arrangement and stem alignment.
description_view_3: The orange flower is centered and closest, with the other three flowers forming a semi-circle behind, clearly showing the petal symmetry.
attribute_petal_arrangement: The petals are arranged in a radial, whorled configuration around the central disk, with each layer slightly overlapping the next, creating a symmetrical and circular floral display.
